item.title: 最近、ツレが「明日のお弁当に入れて～」とおかずをよく買ってくる。今回はでっかいメンツカツ。まあラクでいいんだがね。ねぎ入…
item.author: 白央篤司 hakuo atsushi (@hakuo416.bsky.social)
item.description: 最近、ツレが「明日のお弁当に入れて～」とおかずをよく買ってくる。今回はでっかいメンツカツ。まあラクでいいんだがね。ねぎ入り玉子焼き、ゴーヤーとちりめんじゃこのカレー風味炒め、紅ショウガ、昆布の佃煮ちょいを添える。
item.content:encoded: 最近、ツレが「明日のお弁当に入れて～」とおかずをよく買ってくる。今回はでっかいメンツカツ。まあラクでいいんだがね。ねぎ入り玉子焼き、ゴーヤーとちりめんじゃこのカレー風味炒め、紅ショウガ、昆布の佃煮ちょいを添える。

item.title: Autopsies show how hard doctors tried to save babies who die…
item.author: ProPublica (@propublica.org)
item.description:
Autopsies show how hard doctors tried to save babies who died after not getting a vitamin K shot: tubes inserted in their airways, blood transfusions.

They’re excruciating to read because they underscore how preventable these deaths could have been.

(Published May)
item.content:encoded:
Autopsies show how hard doctors tried to save babies who died after not getting a vitamin K shot: tubes inserted in their airways, blood transfusions.

They’re excruciating to read because they underscore how preventable these deaths could have been.

(Published May)

item.title: For some three decades, Jordan has been an important base fo…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: For some three decades, Jordan has been an important base for American military operations around the Middle East. Now, Jordan is paying a price.
item.content:encoded: For some three decades, Jordan has been an important base for American military operations around the Middle East. Now, Jordan is paying a price.

item.title: おはようございます☀️ お昼を過ぎてしまいましたが、今日もよいお天気ですね✨ ここ１年くらいの間、読んでいる本がいつ…
item.author: mimi🍰 (@mimi32.bsky.social)
item.description:
おはようございます☀️

お昼を過ぎてしまいましたが、今日もよいお天気ですね✨

ここ１年くらいの間、読んでいる本がいつも何らか意味深で、自分の感情に寄り添っていたり、本と会話したりしている

不思議な感覚で毎日ふわふわしてる

皆さんにとって今日も素敵な一日となりますように🕊️
item.content:encoded:
おはようございます☀️

お昼を過ぎてしまいましたが、今日もよいお天気ですね✨

ここ１年くらいの間、読んでいる本がいつも何らか意味深で、自分の感情に寄り添っていたり、本と会話したりしている

不思議な感覚で毎日ふわふわしてる

皆さんにとって今日も素敵な一日となりますように🕊️

item.title: I have to admit that I didn’t know, and I even thought the S…
item.author: REMALONE (@ipasa.bsky.social)
item.description: I have to admit that I didn’t know, and I even thought the Spanish player Cucurella’s look was quite original, when it comes to his hair, but I was unaware of this: If he let his hair grow , it’s so that his autistic son can easily recognize him when he watches him on TV. Truly, this Spanish team ❤️
item.content:encoded: I have to admit that I didn’t know, and I even thought the Spanish player Cucurella’s look was quite original, when it comes to his hair, but I was unaware of this: If he let his hair grow , it’s so that his autistic son can easily recognize him when he watches him on TV. Truly, this Spanish team ❤️

item.title: なめこと厚揚げ、三つ葉のおすまし。昨夜が冷や汁でみそ味だったので、おすましに。昼は味噌汁よりおすましがスッと飲みやすくて…
item.author: 白央篤司 hakuo atsushi (@hakuo416.bsky.social)
item.description: なめこと厚揚げ、三つ葉のおすまし。昨夜が冷や汁でみそ味だったので、おすましに。昼は味噌汁よりおすましがスッと飲みやすくて、いいかもなあ。冷たいものばかり体に入れないよう気を配ってみる。これと買ってきたかき揚げをごはんのせて、きょうのお昼。
item.content:encoded: なめこと厚揚げ、三つ葉のおすまし。昨夜が冷や汁でみそ味だったので、おすましに。昼は味噌汁よりおすましがスッと飲みやすくて、いいかもなあ。冷たいものばかり体に入れないよう気を配ってみる。これと買ってきたかき揚げをごはんのせて、きょうのお昼。

item.title: 今ではトンデモな概念がかつては主流の学説だったり、今では当たり前の概念がかつてはトンデモ扱いだったり、トンデモ仮説から正…
item.author: 悪漢と密偵 (@baddiebeagle.bsky.social)
item.description:
今ではトンデモな概念がかつては主流の学説だったり、今では当たり前の概念がかつてはトンデモ扱いだったり、トンデモ仮説から正しい答えが導かれたり、こじつけの理由が実は正しかったり、結果も導出過程もトンデモなのに現実に合っていたり、挙げ句の果てはトンデモのほうが本質にして真実であったり…。

アリストテレスから、ガリレオ、ニュートン、カルノー、フーリエ、ナビエ－ストークス、アインシュタイン、そして生成AIまで。

田口善弘
『トンデモと科学のあいだ』
www.kodansha.co.jp/book/product...
item.content:encoded:
今ではトンデモな概念がかつては主流の学説だったり、今では当たり前の概念がかつてはトンデモ扱いだったり、トンデモ仮説から正しい答えが導かれたり、こじつけの理由が実は正しかったり、結果も導出過程もトンデモなのに現実に合っていたり、挙げ句の果てはトンデモのほうが本質にして真実であったり…。

アリストテレスから、ガリレオ、ニュートン、カルノー、フーリエ、ナビエ－ストークス、アインシュタイン、そして生成AIまで。

田口善弘
『トンデモと科学のあいだ』
www.kodansha.co.jp/book/product...

item.title: 📗日経サイエンスのご購読は お得な年間定期購読がお薦めです📗 ・毎月の送料は日経サイエンスが負担します。 ・学生…
item.author: 日経サイエンス (@nikkei-science.com)
item.description:
📗日経サイエンスのご購読は
　お得な年間定期購読がお薦めです📗

・毎月の送料は日経サイエンスが負担します。
・学生さんには最大43％OFFになる学割をご用意！

フェイクニュースがあふれる時代
「信頼できる科学情報」をお届けします。
www.nikkei-science.com/subscription...

item.title: Good morning welcome to Tippetty tap tap Thursday You don’t…
item.author: George The Station Cat (@george-station-cat.bsky.social)
item.description:
Good morning welcome to Tippetty tap tap Thursday

You don’t have to become someone new to have a better day. Sometimes the bravest thing you can do is keep being the good person you already are
item.content:encoded:
Good morning welcome to Tippetty tap tap Thursday

You don’t have to become someone new to have a better day. Sometimes the bravest thing you can do is keep being the good person you already are

item.title: Please stop arguing about the historical accuracy of an adap…
item.author: Colin Dickey (@colindickey.com)
item.description: Please stop arguing about the historical accuracy of an adaptation of a book that has a cyclops and a couple of witches and some giants. I’m begging you.
item.content:encoded: Please stop arguing about the historical accuracy of an adaptation of a book that has a cyclops and a couple of witches and some giants. I’m begging you.

item.title: The worst player in the NFL is better than the best athlete …
item.author: Joshua (@rise0522.bsky.social)
item.description: The worst player in the NFL is better than the best athlete you've ever met. The smartest person in the current administration is stupider than the stupidest person you've ever met.

item.title: The Red Sox Venezuelan players and their families honoring t…
item.author: Peter Abraham (@peteabeglobe.bsky.social)
item.description:
The Red Sox Venezuelan players and their families honoring their country as the Sox present a $300K check for earthquake relief.

That’s Willson Contreras with the ceremonial check.
item.content:encoded:
The Red Sox Venezuelan players and their families honoring their country as the Sox present a $300K check for earthquake relief.

That’s Willson Contreras with the ceremonial check.

item.title: Business rates will be cut by 20% for pubs, clubs and live m…

item.description: Business rates will be cut by 20% for pubs, clubs and live music venues across England from April next year, Downing Street has announced.

item.title: A los argentinos los está volviendo más locos perder un part…
item.author: Auri (@aurirua.bsky.social)
item.description: A los argentinos los está volviendo más locos perder un partido de fútbol que tener un presidente fascista
item.content:encoded: A los argentinos los está volviendo más locos perder un partido de fútbol que tener un presidente fascista

item.title: One doctor’s recommendation to deny a 43-year-woman coverage…
item.author: ProPublica (@propublica.org)
item.description:
One doctor’s recommendation to deny a 43-year-woman coverage “contained errors on practically every aspect” of her condition, the Labor Department said in 2012.

United and other insurers continued to hire the doctor over the next decade.

(Published Dec. 2024)
item.content:encoded:
One doctor’s recommendation to deny a 43-year-woman coverage “contained errors on practically every aspect” of her condition, the Labor Department said in 2012.

United and other insurers continued to hire the doctor over the next decade.

(Published Dec. 2024)

item.title: Kotasaari on rohkaiseva esimerkki paljon puhutusta ennallist…
item.author: Oras Tynkkynen (@orastynkkynen.vihreat.fi)
item.description: Kotasaari on rohkaiseva esimerkki paljon puhutusta ennallistamisesta: vain kolmessa vuodessa turpeenkaivuun jättämälle raiskiolle on saatu synnytettyä arvokas lintukeidas.
item.content:encoded: Kotasaari on rohkaiseva esimerkki paljon puhutusta ennallistamisesta: vain kolmessa vuodessa turpeenkaivuun jättämälle raiskiolle on saatu synnytettyä arvokas lintukeidas.

item.title: A third American service member believed to have been killed…
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description: A third American service member believed to have been killed by an Iranian attack on an air base in Jordan has been identified as Sgt. Angel S. Rampersad of New York.
item.content:encoded: A third American service member believed to have been killed by an Iranian attack on an air base in Jordan has been identified as Sgt. Angel S. Rampersad of New York.

item.title: Tämä kukoistava lintuparatiisi Lappeenrannassa oli vain kolm…
item.author: Kerttu Kotakorpi (@kerttukotakorpi.bsky.social)
item.description:
Tämä kukoistava lintuparatiisi Lappeenrannassa oli vain kolme vuotta sitten entinen turpeentuotantoalue. Tällaistakin voidaan tehdä uhanalaisen lintulajiston hyväksi.

yle.fi/a/74-20230405
item.content:encoded:
Tämä kukoistava lintuparatiisi Lappeenrannassa oli vain kolme vuotta sitten entinen turpeentuotantoalue. Tällaistakin voidaan tehdä uhanalaisen lintulajiston hyväksi.

item.title: Dodgers 9, Phillies 5: Rushing, Muncy, and Edman back the in…
item.author: Dodgers Digest (@dodgersdigest.bsky.social)
item.description: Dodgers 9, Phillies 5: Rushing, Muncy, and Edman back the invincible Eric Lauer, who has won 8 in a row
item.content:encoded: Dodgers 9, Phillies 5: Rushing, Muncy, and Edman back the invincible Eric Lauer, who has won 8 in a row
